title: Question: Some SV features seem to be unsupported

features.name: sequential anonymous struct declarations
features.description: Code should include two anonymous struct definitions declared in sequence without a typedef
features.snippet:
struct { logic a; } s1;
struct { logic b; } s2;

features.name: standalone interface without module
features.description: Code should include a standalone interface definition without a surrounding module

features.name: generate statement inside interface
features.description: Code should include a generate block inside an interface definition
features.snippet:
interface my_if();
  generate
    if (1) begin : gen_block
    end
  endgenerate
endinterface

features.name: interface definition inside package
features.description: Code should include an interface definition nested inside a package declaration
